landing.hero.title: Search, plan, and organize your entire trip here.
landing.hero.subtitle: Flights, hotels, and tours together with a visual day-by-day itinerary. Free, no complicated sign-up.
landing.problem.title: Planning a trip shouldn't feel like a job.
landing.problem.lead: But this is how most people do it today:
landing.problem.tabsDesc: comparing flights, hotels, and tours across different sites.
landing.problem.sheetsDesc: trying to organize dates, prices, and bookings.
landing.problem.forgetDesc: and finding out at the airport that you forgot to book the transfer.
landing.solution.title: One place to search, plan, and organize.
landing.solution.desc: Travelyx combines flight, hotel, tour, and attraction searches with a visual itinerary planner — all on the same platform.
landing.solution.integratedSearchDesc: Flights, hotels, tours, and attractions in one interface.
landing.solution.visualItineraryDesc: Organize everything on a day-by-day calendar — drag and drop.
landing.solution.smartAssistantDesc: Automatic itinerary suggestions based on your destination and dates.
landing.how.title: Three steps to the perfect trip
landing.how.step1Desc: Browse flights, hotels, and tours. Compare prices and discover deals.
landing.how.step2Desc: Add to your visual planner. Organize day by day on the calendar.
landing.how.step3Desc: Everything organized at your fingertips. No surprises, no spreadsheets.
landing.benefits.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
landing.benefits.freeDesc: No subscription, no hidden fees. Plan as many trips as you want.
landing.benefits.integratedDesc: Search flights, hotels, tours, and attractions without leaving the platform.
landing.benefits.visualDesc: See your entire trip organized by day on an intuitive calendar.
landing.benefits.globalDesc: Coverage in over 190 countries with real-time updated data.
landing.destinations.title: Explore amazing destinations
landing.destinations.subtitle: The most searched places by travelers on Travelyx
landing.destinations.loginToExplore: Sign in with Google to explore more destinations
landing.cta.title: Start planning your next trip.
landing.cta.subtitle: It's free, takes less than 1 minute, and you don't need a credit card.
